violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by (storage cart). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

(ham and cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. The hand-washing sink in the rear kitchen near reach-in refrigeration kitchen was blocked by boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
